languages.text: The wearer gains {uip|Count|0eaa3dfaf2cf49109eef844b9477cd5a} melee counterattacks per round and allies always dodge his attacks

languages.text: Each {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, when the user is attacked, they counterattack (up to {uip|Count|0eaa3dfaf2cf49109eef844b9477cd5a} times). Allies always {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} their attacks.
languages.original_text: The wearer gains {uip|Count|0eaa3dfaf2cf49109eef844b9477cd5a} melee counterattacks per round and allies always dodge his attacks

traits.locale_text: Each round, when the user is attacked, they counterattack (up to {uip|Count|0eaa3dfaf2cf49109eef844b9477cd5a} times). Allies always dodge their attacks.

Each {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, when the user is attacked, they counterattack (up to {uip|Count|0eaa3dfaf2cf49109eef844b9477cd5a} times). Allies always {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} their attacks.
Each round, when the user is attacked, they counterattack (up to {uip|Count|0eaa3dfaf2cf49109eef844b9477cd5a} times). Allies always dodge their attacks.

languages.text: Когда персонажа атакуют, на первые {uip|Count|0eaa3dfaf2cf49109eef844b9477cd5a} атак за {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g} он отвечает контратакой. Союзники всегда {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклоняются{/g} от его атак.

traits.locale_text: Когда персонажа атакуют, на первые {uip|Count|0eaa3dfaf2cf49109eef844b9477cd5a} атак за раунд он отвечает контратакой. Союзники всегда {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклоняются{/g} от его атак.
Когда персонажа атакуют, на первые {uip|Count|0eaa3dfaf2cf49109eef844b9477cd5a} атак за раунд он отвечает контратакой. Союзники всегда {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклоняются{/g} от его атак.

languages.text: Cada {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}, cuando el usuario sufre un ataque, contraataca (hasta {uip|Count|0eaa3dfaf2cf49109eef844b9477cd5a} veces). Los aliados siempre {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquivan{/g} sus ataques.
languages.original_text: Each {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, when the user is attacked, they counterattack (up to {uip|Count|0eaa3dfaf2cf49109eef844b9477cd5a} times). Allies always {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} their attacks.

traits.locale_text: Cada {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}, cuando el usuario sufre un ataque, contraataca (hasta {uip|Count|0eaa3dfaf2cf49109eef844b9477cd5a} veces). Los aliados siempre {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquivan{/g} sus ataques.

languages.text: Wird der Nutzer in einer {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} attackiert, macht er (bis zu {uip|Count|0eaa3dfaf2cf49109eef844b9477cd5a}) Gegenangriffe. Verbündete können seinen Angriffen immer {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}ausweichen{/g}.
languages.original_text: Each {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, when the user is attacked, they counterattack (up to {uip|Count|0eaa3dfaf2cf49109eef844b9477cd5a} times). Allies always {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} their attacks.

traits.locale_text: Wird der Nutzer in einer {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} attackiert, macht er (bis zu {uip|Count|0eaa3dfaf2cf49109eef844b9477cd5a}) Gegenangriffe. Verbündete können seinen Angriffen immer {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}ausweichen{/g}.

languages.text: À chaque {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, l'utilisateur riposte quand il est attaqué (jusqu'à {uip|Count|0eaa3dfaf2cf49109eef844b9477cd5a} fois). Les alliés {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquivent{/g} toujours les attaques.
languages.original_text: Each {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, when the user is attacked, they counterattack (up to {uip|Count|0eaa3dfaf2cf49109eef844b9477cd5a} times). Allies always {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} their attacks.

traits.locale_text: À chaque {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, l'utilisateur riposte quand il est attaqué (jusqu'à {uip|Count|0eaa3dfaf2cf49109eef844b9477cd5a} fois). Les alliés {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquivent{/g} toujours les attaques.

languages.text: Her {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rauntta{/g} kullanıcı, saldırıya uğradığında karşı saldırı gerçekleştirir (en fazla {uip|Count|0eaa3dfaf2cf49109eef844b9477cd5a} kez). Dost birimler, kullanıcının saldırılarından her daim {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçınır{/g}.
languages.original_text: Each {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, when the user is attacked, they counterattack (up to {uip|Count|0eaa3dfaf2cf49109eef844b9477cd5a} times). Allies always {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} their attacks.

traits.locale_text: Her {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rauntta{/g} kullanıcı, saldırıya uğradığında karşı saldırı gerçekleştirir (en fazla {uip|Count|0eaa3dfaf2cf49109eef844b9477cd5a} kez). Dost birimler, kullanıcının saldırılarından her daim {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçınır{/g}.

languages.text: 每{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}受到攻击时，使用者将会反击（最多{uip|Count|0eaa3dfaf2cf49109eef844b9477cd5a}次）。盟友必定{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}其攻击。
languages.original_text: Each {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, when the user is attacked, they counterattack (up to {uip|Count|0eaa3dfaf2cf49109eef844b9477cd5a} times). Allies always {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} their attacks.

traits.locale_text: 每{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}受到攻击时，使用者将会反击（最多{uip|Count|0eaa3dfaf2cf49109eef844b9477cd5a}次）。盟友必定{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}其攻击。

languages.text: 各{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}、ユーザーが攻撃されると反撃する（最大{uip|Count|0eaa3dfaf2cf49109eef844b9477cd5a}回）。味方は攻撃を常に{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}回避{/g}する。
languages.original_text: Each {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, when the user is attacked, they counterattack (up to {uip|Count|0eaa3dfaf2cf49109eef844b9477cd5a} times). Allies always {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} their attacks.

traits.locale_text: 各{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}、ユーザーが攻撃されると反撃する（最大{uip|Count|0eaa3dfaf2cf49109eef844b9477cd5a}回）。味方は攻撃を常に{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}回避{/g}する。
